mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, care_plan_id, trigger_type, trigger_detail, severity, status, assigned_to, created_at, resolved_at, resolution_note
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM alert_event WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_event ( tenant_id, patient_id, care_plan_id, trigger_type, trigger_detail, severity, status, assigned_to, resolved_at, resolution_note ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{carePlanId}, #{triggerType}, #{triggerDetail, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{severity}, #{status}, #{assignedTo}, #{resolvedAt}, #{resolutionNote} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_event SET patient_id = #{patientId}, care_plan_id = #{carePlanId}, trigger_type = #{triggerType}, trigger_detail = #{triggerDetail, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, severity = #{severity}, status = #{status}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, resolution_note = #{resolutionNote} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
